title: Slightly lower HDL ("Good") Cholesterol
summary: Slightly lower HDL ("Good") Cholesterol.
detail: This slightly reduces levels of good HDL cholesterol in your blood. And that's usually bad, because HDL cholesterol actually cleans your arteries and transports cholesterol out of your body.
